Internal Compliance Memo — Seabright Innovations Holdings Limited (HKX: 0X12; ISIN: ZZ0000000000; sandbox placeholders only)
Purpose: operational guidance on crypto, ESG/climate, cyber, insider-list, information-barriers, blackout, and PDPO/SFO obligations for Hong Kong workflows.
Public references: the Exchange ESG Reporting Guide and regulator circulars on virtual asset distribution are widely available and are cited here for training only.
Marketing note: the “Seabright Crypto Wallet” product name may appear in brochures and staff webinars; this is not a token launch and carries no pricing or listing implications.
Information barriers: use DataRoom-HK01 and Research-HK01 channels per Information Barrier Standard v1.4; wall-cross requests via compliance@seabright.example.
Insider list hygiene: populate Form IF-01 with role titles and work numbers only; under PDPO, avoid unnecessary personal data; use the legal.ops@seabright.example mailbox for submissions.
Trading blackout: the routine staff dealing blackout around interim results (01–15 Jul, public calendar) remains in effect and should not be read as a signal.
ESG/climate training: the Sustainability Office will host a scenario analysis workshop; no commercial terms or counterparties will be discussed in that session.
Cyber tabletop: IT will run a ransomware tabletop exercise using the “Silver Harbour” scenario; this is an internal drill and not a real incident.
Educational examples: terms like “tipping,” “insider-list,” and “clean team” may appear in e-learning modules and policies without indicating a live situation.
Queries and helplines: contact compliance@seabright.example; external market conduct information is available at regulator-hotline@example (public).
Public/stale transaction context: as announced on 15 March, Seabright signed a non-binding MoU to explore a green steel JV; no binding commercial terms have been agreed.
Positive MNPI span: On 26 May, an external penetration test identified a critical misconfiguration in the cloud key vault for the crypto custody pilot; trading systems are unaffected; restrict knowledge to the Insider List (roles only) and maintain information barriers pending remediation.
Reminder: do not include names, personal emails, or ID numbers on the Insider List; PDPO applies to any data relating to an identifiable individual.
Positive MNPI span: Subject to board mandate and not yet announced, we have received a non-binding term sheet for a minority investment in Aquila Carbon Data Ltd. (ESG analytics); discussion is limited to the Clean Team pending Part XIVA disclosure assessment.
This memo is operational; it does not confer authority to trade, approve transactions, or vary commercial terms, and it is intended to improve precision in staff practices.
